signup.title: Create your Nafura account
signup.subtitle: Launch your Nafura ERP in under 5 minutes.
signup.passwordHint: At least 8 characters, one uppercase letter and one digit
signup.verifyEmailSent: A confirmation email was sent. Click the link to activate your account.
signup.checkEmailIntro: We sent a confirmation link to:
signup.checkEmailHint: Click the link in the email to activate your account, then continue setup. Check spam if needed.
signup.verifyFailed: Invalid or expired link. Sign up again or request a new email.
signup.resendSuccess: If a signup is pending for this address, a new confirmation email was sent.
signup.resendError: Could not resend the email right now. Please try again shortly.
signup.errorEmailTaken: This email is already linked to a completed account. Sign in from the login page.
signup.errorEmailResumeHint: If signup was interrupted, submit again with the same email to resume.
signup.errorGeneric: Could not create the account. Please try again.

flow.title: Setting up Nafura
flow.q1: What is your company name and ICE number?
flow.q3: How many people are on your team?
flow.q4: Which markets do you work on?
flow.ready: Nafura is ready. Shall we create your first project?
flow.goChantier: Yes, I have an active project
flow.errorCreateTenant: Could not create your company. Check the ICE and try again.
flow.errorPresetConflict: Setup was partially applied. Click « Configure Nafura » again.
flow.errorGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again.

checklist.chart: Moroccan BTP chart of accounts loaded
checklist.fiscal: Tax settings (20% VAT, withholding if public)

invite.title: Invite colleagues to get the most from Nafura
